maay_maay.answer_your_first_challenge_correctly: Challenge-kaaga koowaad si sax ah uga jawaab
maay_maay.estimate_the_value_the_arrow_points_to: Qiyaas value-ka fallaadhu tilmaamayso (tirada saboolka ugu dhow).
maay_maay.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Guji number line-ka kore si aad marker u dhigto.
maay_maay.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Number line marker. Isticmaal arrow keys si aad u dhaqaajiso, Home/End endpoints, Shift steps waaweyn.
maay_maay.number_line_fractions_above_decimals_b: 📏 Number line — fractions kor, decimals hoos
maay_maay.same_amount_three_more_visuals_quantit: 🔄 Qadar isku mid, 3 visual oo kale. Qadarku wuu ilaalinayaa dhammaan representation kasta.
maay_maay.move_the_marker_by_a_fraction_fraction: ➕➖ Ku dhaqaaji marker fraction — fraction arithmetic line-ka
maay_maay.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: Guji chip hoose. Marker-ku wuu siibanayaa; dhammaan 4-ta visual way cusboonaadaan. Line-ku si toos ah ayuu u fidayaa haddii aad cidhifka dhaafto.
maay_maay.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Common-denominator hunter — sida loo kordhiyo fractions leh denominators kala duwan
maay_maay.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: Si toos ah uma kordhin kartid 1/2 + 1/3. Marka hore hel denominator wadaag ah (LCM ayaa shaqeeya), dib u magacow fraction kasta, ka dibna kordhi numerators.
maay_maay.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Equivalent fractions — meel isku mid, magacyo badan. Guji si aad dib u qaybiso line-ka.
maay_maay.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: Ku dhufo (ama u qaybi) kore IYO hoose tiro isku mid ah → value isku mid, magac kala duwan. Marker-ku ma dhaqaaqo.
maay_maay.quick_conversions_click_to_plot: 📌 Quick conversions (guji si aad u dhigto):
maay_maay.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Quarter waa $0.25 = 1/4 dollar. Dime waa $0.10 = 1/10. Coins waa decimal-fraction practice.
maay_maay.every_decimal_place_is_a_fraction_1st_: Decimal place kasta waa fraction. 1st place: tenths, 2nd: hundredths, 3rd: thousandths.
maay_maay.reset_frac_dec_tab_to_defaults: Dib u dhig Frac Dec tab defaults
maay_maay.why_fractions_and_decimals_are_the_sam: 💡 Sababta fractions iyo decimals ay isku shay u yihiin
maay_maay.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 macnaheedu waa "3 loo qaybiyay 4." Qor 3 ÷ 4 calculator kasta: 0.75. Slash iyo ÷ isku shay ayay ka dhigan yihiin.
maay_maay.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Decimal waa fraction leh denominator qarsoon.
maay_maay.0_6_means_6_tenths_6_10_0_25_means_25_: 0.6 macnaheedu waa "6 tenths," 6/10. 0.25 macnaheedu waa "25 hundredths," 25/100, oo u fududaada 1/4.
maay_maay.the_point_at_1_4_is_the_same_point_as_: Point-ka 1/4 waa point-ka isku mid ah point-ka 0.25. Meel isku mid, laba magac.
maay_maay.some_terminate_some_repeat: Qaar way dhammaadaan, qaar way dib u noqdaan.
maay_maay.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (istaaga). 1/4 = 0.25 (istaaga). 1/3 = 0.333… (weligiis dib u noqda). Denominator ayaa go'aamiya: haddii uu u kala baxo 2 iyo 5 oo keliya, wuu dhammaadaa. Haddii kale wuu dib u noqdaa. Fiiri ↻ ee decimal card-ka.
maay_maay.focus_explore_body: Dhig range-ka, kordhi markers, isbarbardhig masaafooyinka.
maay_maay.focus_challenges_body: Ku celceli qiyaasidda, rounding, iyo helitaanka values.
maay_maay.focus_frac_body: Isku xir fractions, decimals, percents, iyo area models.
maay_maay.focus_compare_body: Tijaabi fraction size relationships iyada oo aan dhibco lahayn.
maay_maay.focus_summary: Isticmaal hal line si aad u hesho values, u muujiso boodada, iyo u xirto equivalent forms.
maay_maay.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Baadh — guriga muuqaalka ee number sense
maay_maay.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Tirooyin sida boosas line, maaha symbols keliya. Negatives waxay ka muuqdaan dhinaca kale ee zero. Fractions waxay fadhiyaan U DHEXEEYA integers; decimals waa fikrad isku mid ah oo faahfaahsan. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
maay_maay.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: 7/8 xaggee ayuu fadhiyaa? Ka warran −2.4? Qiyaasidu waxay dhistaa magnitude sense. Cilmi-baaris (Siegler 2009) waxay muujisaa number-line precision inuu math success mustaqbalka ka wanaagsan uu saadaaliyo rote facts.
maay_maay.skip_count_the_bridge_to_multiplicatio: Skip Count — the bridge to multiplication
maay_maay.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = 2 times table oo socda. Skip counting 5 iyo 10 waxay horay u dhistaa money iyo time. Gadaal u tirinta 3 waxay horay u dhistaa subtraction iyo division. Line-ku wuu muujiyaa laxanka.
maay_maay.fractions_decimals_same_point_two_name: Fractions ↔ Decimals, meel isku mid, laba magac
maay_maay.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Fraction waa division problem. Decimal waa fraction leh denominator qarsoon oo 10, 100, 1000… 1/4 iyo 0.25 waa meesha ISKU MID AH line-ka. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
maay_maay.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Laba fractions, 4 relationships: siman, taabanaya ½ landmark, A yar, ama B yar. Jiid sliders, diiwaan geli waxa aad ogaato, qorna comparison rule-kaaga.
maay_maay.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Hagaaji numerators iyo denominators laba fractions. Widget-ku wuxuu kuu sheegaa mid ka mid ah 4 relationships. Dhibco ma jiraan, reveal ma jirto — kaliya jiid oo ogow.
maay_maay.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Hypothesis (qoraal xor ah): Goorma ayay laba fractions siman yihiin? Goorma ayaa mid ku dhow ½?
maay_maay.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Hel laba fractions oo leh numerators iyo denominators kala duwan oo siman.
maay_maay.what_makes_a_fraction_close_to_what_ab: Maxaa fraction ku dhaweeya ½? Ka warran ku dhow 1?
maay_maay.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Goorma ayay laba fractions fudud yihiin in la isbarbardhigo? Goorma ayay adag yihiin?
maay_maay.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Sharax sida loo isbarbardhigo laba fractions iyada oo aan loo beddelin decimals.
maay_maay.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Design note: discrete 4-state outcome; fraction-comparison score ma jiro; reveal ma jiro — si ula kac ah.
maay_maay.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: tabs | N: challenge cusub | ?: AI tutor | ← → marker: dhaqaaji | Home/End: cidhifyo
maay_maay.integer_lab_summary: Fur mini lab-ka marka negative numbers ay focus yihiin.
maay_maay.absolute_value_number_line_showing_dis: Absolute value number line oo muujinaya masaafada zero
